title: pelargonium × scitulum
intro: Pelargonium × scitulum, also known as Rose Geranium or Barwood, is a hybrid species of pelargonium plants, typically grown for its fragrant flowers and leaves with a rose-like scent. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × scitulum include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its ability to help with skin conditions and wounds due to its antiseptic properties. Pelargonium × scitulum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to various areas of the body.
